5230741 林○賢 M/51 衰弱量表 3 VS 歐金俊醫師、熊敬業醫師消化道癌
Adenocarcinoma of rectosigmoid colon with obstruction
現病史C.C. Intermittent watery diarrhea and abdominal colicky pain for 3 weeks.
2026/04/23 visited GI OPD.
FOBT was positive (153.5).
過去病史Nil
癌指數FOBT： 153.5
AFP： 1.81
CEA： 4.34
CA199： 17.60
病理2026-05-13： Biopsy (RSJ): High-grade glandular intraepithelial neoplasia without definite invasive component. Re-biopsy recommended.2026-05-18： Biopsy (20 cm from anal verge): Well-differentiated adenocarcinoma in mucosa.
檢查CT(2026-05-13)
Focal sigmoid colon wall thickening with surrounding inflammatory change.Endoscopy(2026-05-13)
Sigmoidoscopy: Partially obstructing rectosigmoid junction lesion at 15 cm from anal verge; scope could not pass through. Large rectal polyp (2.5–3 cm) noted at 5 cm from anal verge.Endoscopy(2026-05-18)
Repeat sigmoidoscopy: Ulcerative lesion at 20 cm from anal verge causing luminal narrowing and obstruction; biopsy performed. Incomplete examination due to obstructing tumor.PET-CT(2026-05-22)
hypermetabolic distal sigmoid colon malignancy with suspected peri-colonic invasion and regional lymph node metastases. No definite distant metastasis.
Clinical stage: cT3N2M0.
治療CCRT(2026-05-28)
CCRT 5040 cGy/28 fractions with Capecitabine.
討論•discussion : Treatment sequencing and surgical timing for rectosigmoid adenocarcinoma. Clinical stage cT3N2M0 (Stage IIIB/IIIC). Discussion regarding nodal status classification (cN2a vs cN2b) and its impact on staging and risk stratification. Completion colonoscopy before surgery should be arranged because the initial examination was incomplete due to an obstructing tumor.
•decision : CCRT -> TNT -> completion colonoscopy prior to surgery -> surgical resection.
影像討論分期討論治療策略討論
1/6
787544 李○枝 F/64 衰弱量表 4 VS 歐金俊醫師、熊敬業醫師消化道癌
Rectal adenocarcinoma
現病史C.C. Bloody stools for 6 months.
2026/05/11 ER visit due to chest pain, cold sweating, shortness of breath, and dizziness.
FOBT >400. Suspected colonic lesion and admitted for further evaluation.
過去病史HTN(+)
癌指數FOBT： >400
AFP： 1.09
CEA： 5.97
CA199： 11.50
CA125： 7.80
病理2026-05-14： Biopsy (10 cm from anal verge): well-differentiated adenocarcinoma with ulceration
檢查Endoscopy(2026-06-14)
Rectal tumor located 10 cm from anal verge. Incomplete examination; only sigmoidoscopy was performed and complete colonoscopy was not achieved.PET-CT(2026-06-18)
Hypermetabolic rectosigmoid malignancy with suspected peri-colonic invasion and regional lymph node involvement. No definite distant metastasis.
Clinical stage: cT3N1bM0, Stage IIIB
治療CCRT(2026-05-25)
CCRT 5040 cGy/28 fractions with Capecitabine.
討論•discussion : Treatment sequencing and surgical timing for cT3N1bM0 rectal adenocarcinoma, Stage IIIB. Consider XELOX x 6 cycles after completion of CCRT. Completion colonoscopy before surgery should be arranged because the initial examination was limited to sigmoidoscopy.
•decision : CCRT -> XELOX x 6 cycles -> completion colonoscopy prior to surgery -> surgical resection.
影像討論分期討論治療策略討論

5105022 侯○輝 M/68 衰弱量表 3 VS 歐金俊醫師消化道癌
Transverse colon adenocarcinoma with obstruction
現病史C.C. Abdominal pain for 2 days.
2026/05/15 ER visit due to abdominal pain migrating from LLQ to epigastric area.
KUB and CT suggested transverse colon obstruction.
The patient was admitted for further evaluation of suspected bowel obstruction and advanced CKD.
過去病史CKD(+) HTN(+) BPH、hyperlipidemia、gout
癌指數FOBT： >400
AFP： 1.86
CEA： 3.68
CA199： 18.10
病理2026-05-16： Colonoscopic biopsy (transverse colon): well-differentiated adenocarcinoma in mucosa.2026-05-19： 2026/05/20 Laparoscopic right hemicolectomy:
•moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma (Grade 2).
•Tumor invaded pericolic soft tissue (pT3).
•Lymphovascular invasion present; perineural invasion absent.
•Margins negative.
•No lymph node metastasis (0/32).
•MMR proficient (MLH1/MSH2/MSH6/PMS2 intact), MSS.
•Final pathology: pT3N0, Stage IIA.
檢查CT(2026-05-15)
Fecal loading with dilatation of the terminal ileum and ascending colon, suspicious for localized ileus or partial bowel obstruction.
治療OP(2026-05-19)
Laparoscopic right hemicolectomy
討論•discussion : Clinical stage cT3N1M0, Stage IIIB transverse colon adenocarcinoma with obstruction. Postoperative pathology revealed pT3N0(0/32)cM0, Stage IIA. A complete preoperative colonoscopy was not feasible because the transverse colon tumor caused luminal obstruction. Postoperative completion colonoscopy should be arranged within 6 months to exclude synchronous lesions.
•decision : UFUR adjuvant treatment, CT abdomen follow-up in 2026/11, completion colonoscopy within 6 months after surgery.
影像討論分期討論治療策略討論
3/6
1591679 蔡○愛 F/81 衰弱量表 4 VS 歐金俊醫師消化道癌
Hepatic flexure colon adenocarcinoma
現病史C.C. Right-sided abdominal pain for about 1 week.
On 2026/05/18, she visited Yunlin Chang Gung Hospital, where abdominal CT revealed a colonic tumor and surgical treatment was recommended.
She was referred to our ER on 2026/05/19 for further evaluation and management.
過去病史DM(+) HTN(+) CAD(+) coronary artery disease s/p stent, right UPJ stone s/p URSL and DBJ insertion, history of urosepsis with septic shock
癌指數AFP： <0.91
CEA： 4.88
CA199： 8.73
病理2026-05-25：
• 2026/05/25 Laparoscopic right hemicolectomy: moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma arising in tubular adenoma, located at hepatic flexure, 5.7 cm.
• Tumor invaded through muscularis propria into pericolic tissue (pT3).
• Lymphovascular invasion positive; perineural invasion positive.
• Margins negative; tumor deposits negative.
• Regional lymph nodes: 0/19 involved.
• MMR proficient (MLH1/MSH2/MSH6/PMS2 intact), MSS.
檢查CT(2026-05-18)
外片報告 cT3N1aM0, stage IIIB
治療OP(2026-05-25)
Laparoscopic right hemicolectomy
討論 Clinical stage cT3N1aM0 (Stage IIIB) based on preoperative CT. Final pathology revealed pT3N0(0/19)cM0 (Stage IIA). Postoperative adjuvant treatment and surveillance strategy were discussed.

0137391 林○安 M/73 衰弱量表 3 VS 歐金俊醫師消化道癌
Sigmoid colon adenocarcinoma
現病史C.C. In 2026/01, the patient underwent TURP and double-J stent placement at Yuan-Rong Hospital for BPH.
During evaluation for postoperative infection, abdominal CT revealed colonic diverticulosis. Subsequent colonoscopy at Yuan-Rong Hospital identified a sigmoid colon tumor, and biopsy confirmed adenocarcinoma.
The patient was then referred to our hospital for further staging evaluation and surgical management.
過去病史BPH s/p TURP and double-J in 2026-1, double-J was removed
癌指數AFP： <0.91
CEA： 5.63
CA199： 12.90
病理2026-05-27：
•moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma of sigmoid colon, 7.0 cm.
•Tumor invaded through muscularis propria into pericolorectal tissues (pT3).
•Lymphovascular invasion present; perineural invasion absent.
•Regional lymph node metastasis: 2/25 positive with extranodal extension.
•Margins negative; tumor deposits negative.
•MMR proficient (MLH1/MSH2/MSH6/PMS2 intact), MSS.
•Final pathology: pT3N1b.
檢查PET-CT(2026-05-27)
Hypermetabolic sigmoid colon malignancy with suspected peritoneal invasion.
Multiple hypermetabolic peri-tumoral and para-aortic lymph nodes, suspicious for regional and distant lymph node metastases.
Mild FDG uptake in left level V cervical lymph node, favored reactive.
No definite liver, lung, or bone metastasis.
Clinical stage: cT4aN2M1a (para-aortic LN), Stage IVA.
治療OP(2026-05-26)
Laparoscopic sigmoidectomy
討論Clinical stage cT4aN2M1a (para-aortic lymph node metastasis), Stage IVA . Final pathology revealed pT3N1b(2/25)cM1a, Stage IVA. Postoperative systemic treatment strategy and surveillance plan were discussed.
影像討論分期討論治療策略討論

1780985 游○眾 M/66 衰弱量表 3 VS 歐金俊醫師消化道癌
1. Rectal adenocarcinoma 2.Tonsil cancer
現病史C.C. Change of bowel habit with no passage of feces for 3 days about one month ago.
The patient initially sought medical attention at Yuan-Rong Hospital, where rectal adenocarcinoma was diagnosed.
He was referred to our hospital for further evaluation and treatment.
過去病史Nil
癌指數AFP： 2.47
CEA ： 21.8
CA199： 84.30
PSA： 4.95
病理2026-05-27： 2026/05/27 Colonoscopic biopsy (5–10 cm from anal verge): moderately differentiated rectal adenocarcinoma.2026-05-28： 2026/05/28 KRAS mutation detected (Exon 3, Q61X); NRAS and BRAF wild type.2026-05-28： 2026/05/28 Left tonsil biopsy: moderately differentiated squamous cell carcinoma, p16 positive.
檢查PET-CT(2026-05-26)
1. Compatible with a highly metabolic active malignancy in upper rectum, with peri-colonic invasion.
2. Regional & distant LN metastases are considered for the multiple nodules in peri-tumoral, right external iliac & right common iliac areas.
3. Synchronous malignancy is suspected for the hypermetabolic lesion over left oropharynx.
4. Warthin's tumor is considered for the hypermetabolic lesion in left parotid gland, DDx: malignancy.
5. Inflammation/infection may be considered first for the hypermetabolic lesions RUL/RML/RLL.
TNM staging for Colorectal cancer (AJCC 8th edition): cT3N2bM1aMRI(2026-05-28)
rectal tumor invading perirectal tissues (T3) with right iliac lymphadenopathy; preliminary stage T3N1aM0.
治療C/T(2026-05-28)
Capecitabine.RT(2026-06-01)
Short-course radiotherapy 2500 cGy / 5 fractions
討論Staging discussion for rectal cancer and tonsil cancer, with evaluation of treatment priority and overall treatment strategy.
影像討論分期討論治療策略討論

2073623 王○益 F/48 VS 歐金俊醫師醫療小組
Adenocarcinoma of sigmoid colon
現病史
C.C. Positive FOBT identified through community screening. Colonoscopy at our GI clinic revealed sigmoid colon adenocarcinoma. Endoscopic mucosal resection (EMR) was performed on 2025/09/18; however, pathology showed submucosal invasion (5 mm) with residual lesion. The patient was admitted for further surgical management.
討論要點
醫療小組 臨床分期:【2025/10/23多專科會議團隊結論】 EMR=>cT1(submucosa)N0M0 StageI 病理分期:不適用 後續治療:OP
摘要
2026/05/05 Laparoscopic sigmoidectomy: no residual tumor identified at previous EMR site. Surgical margins negative. No lymph node metastasis (0/8, including D3 LN 0/3). Tumor deposits absent. Final pathology: pTxN0.
決策
sigmoid colon 臨床分期:EMR=>cT1(submucosa)N0M0 StageI 病理分期:pT1N0(0/8)M0 Stage I 後續治療:OPD F/U
1440640 黃○桂 M/84 VS 歐金俊醫師醫療小組
Adenocarcinoma of rectosigmoid colon
現病史
C.C. Bloody stool noted once on 2026/03/25. The patient visited the ER and initially refused admission, requesting outpatient follow-up. Colonoscopy on 2026/03/27 revealed a sigmoid colon tumor, and biopsy confirmed adenocarcinoma.
討論要點
2026/05/11 醫療小組 臨床分期:cT2N0M0 stage I 病理分期:不適用 後續治療:op
摘要
2026/05/12 Laparoscopic low anterior resection: •adenocarcinoma arising in traditional serrated adenoma. •Tumor invaded submucosa only (T1). •Well-differentiated adenocarcinoma (Grade 1). •Margins negative. •No lymphovascular invasion, perineural invasion, or tumor deposits. •No lymph node metastasis (0/19). •MMR proficient (MLH1/MSH2/MSH6/PMS2 intact), MSS. •Final pathology: pT1N0.
決策
rectosigmoid colon 臨床分期:cT2N0M0 Stage I 病理分期:pT1N0(0/19)M0 Stage I 後續治療:OPD F/U
